caption:
Imagine enrolling 200 new members into a $47/mth offer in 30 days! 👌😍🔥

How would this change your business, how would this allow you to move creatively and financially - knowing that every. single. month $8K is going to land into your account regardless if you sell or not?

Life changing right.

Especially given that’s just in the first month.

This is EXACTLY what’s happened to Luna (who teaches vibe coding).

Sharing your show you what’s possible 💫

I did it!!!

I made my own wool stuffed pillow using wool shorn from my own sheep (this one pillow came from the wool of 3 sheep! 🤯). 

Cleaned the wool (three times)

Then let it dry out.

Then had to fluff it all out.

It’s not the thickest pillow but it’s super comfortable.

Feeling accomplished and slightly superior to everyone 😂

 I now also understand why it costs $160 for a wool pillow, this was a lot of work 😮‍💨

Anyways off to enjoy my all organic rest while all you peasants sleep on your polyester plastic pillows

caption:
The past two weeks I have been leading a group of 50 starseeds across the globe in an initiation of personal alchemy timed around the equinox and first full moon of April. 

After two weeks of shedding, releasing, mourning and creating space for the new in the void, this morning, coinciding with Easter and “resurrection” I got up to be with the sunrise to call in what I welcome into my life. 

And nature did not disappoint 🤯🥰

Feeling incredibly grateful, renewed and hopeful for this new timeline I have stepped into.

I’m also so  appreciative to all those who trusted me to guide them through this portal, it has been the greatest honor to witness and to be a part of your journeys. 

Have a wonderful Easter weekend everyone x 

🩵🤍🩷

At a recent retreat I hosted, I was instructed to “use my voice”. At first I was confused by this. Mostly because, while I recognise there is a lot going on in the world, I don’t follow most of it. I purposely stay off the news because my mental health simply cannot handle it. So when I received this message I didn’t feel like my voice had credibility, it felt uninformed. Like who am I to protest? That’s how I initially interpreted it 

Not long after, this message was delivered to me again from two seperate, unconnected sources “use your voice to help the world, it needs it right now.”

So I sat with this, still confused initially and then realising. It’s not about me protesting or fighting against, infact that goes against everything I teach and know. It’s about using my voice to show others how to find peace in highly dense conditions. 

I’m not claiming to know all the answers but here’s what I know: when I fought against depression for three years of my life, it nearly cost me my life. The more I fought, the more I tried to suppress, resist and war with it, the more I feared it, the bigger the teeth it grew. 

The release only happened once I accepted depression, once I allowed it to be a part of my reality - then and only then was I able to refocus and actually find my smile again.

The Kybalion teaches that the micro mimics the macro - as above, so below. The roots of a tree are just like the veins in your lungs. The pupils of your eyes look eerily similar to the stars in the sky. And through my own experience of going to war or being in fear of the shadows at the micro level of my life, I was taught a great cosmic macro lesson.

Timeline jumping is a skill we all have, it is achieved through your focus. If you have been living in a lot of fear or angst then know that pattern interrupting your focus will require intention on your part - this is not something you will do spontaneously. 

The easiest way to distract focus away from chaos is 1. Accept the chaos first and foremost, duality is the basic law of this universe, you will never win a war against the dark for the dark mirrors the light and vice versa. Both are needed, winter and summer. 2) 👇🏽
firstComment: 100%. Thanks for the reminder! 🙌 We lead the way as you say 😉

latestComments.text: 100%. Thanks for the reminder! 🙌 We lead the way as you say 😉
I love this message. It really resonates 💜
So well said 🔥 and exactly my viewpoint (probably very heavily installed by you hahhaa)

I also recognise not everyone will be ready to hear this message. Most people have been taught they are victims. Most people will want to keep defending their choice to fight or resist against the dark even though they have become shells of themselves, depleted of life force in their quests driven by anger and rage. If you have read this message, and you understand it, you are one of the few.

caption:
Started taking strength training seriously seven months ago and have gained 5kgs since,  I even have back jelly rolls now 😂 

But you know what, I have never felt stronger and better in my body. I even love my c section scar now 🥹💕 

I used to fear aging and gaining weight (so much so that I had an eating disorder most of my teens) but the older i get the more confident I become. I’m more assured now than when i was twenty and twenty pounds lighter.

REMeber: confidence shouldnt hinge on your weight or age, its something you harness within x

caption:
Malibu 🌴

⚡️ zip, zap, zop

🐰mad hatter costumes 

🐉 dragons 

🧆 five star dining 

💕 meeting old friends in real life for the first time 

💨 crazy weather unusual for the area (I think I was in a hurricane for one of the nights and then an artic blast the next!) 😂👌 

😍 a lot of outside of the comfort zones, and everybody meeting themselves at new levels of courage 🙌

👯‍♀️👯‍♂️👯 new lifelong friends, the kind that understand what you’re going through and calibrate your beliefs of what is possible for you. 

For me personally here have been two big takeaways already from the retreat: 

1. I can trust my gut and this feeling is always a clean yes, if it’s a muddled this or that question mark then it’s a take it or leave it type of thing. Prime example, I was really torn with booking a horse assisted therapy experience for the day to symbolise the lunar new year, part of me was saying the idea for the horses was intuition and if I didn’t book it I would be going against it. But there was another part that kept stalling, and this part was stronger. I thought it was because of fear, turns out it was raining that day and the horses would have been cancelled anyways. I was procrastinating putting the deposit down and scolding myself for it, in the end it would have been a waste of time. I would have been better off preparing for a plan b, which I did NOT do, up until the very day of the retreat I wasn’t sure what we would talk about and this gave me some anxiety, but I suspected I didn’t need to plan this. I felt the crowd on the day and went into the themes. This worked out so much better👌 even in the stalling it was perfectly orchestrated, so a lot of what’s best for us can be felt as resistance.

Read comments for the rest 👇🏽

latestComments.text: Looks amazing - wish I made it! Next time. x

replies.text: @lizansimpson oh man you would have loved it, everyone is keen for AU again 👀

latestComments.text:
Malibu retreat you filled my cup, thank you to all of you that made this event what it was you know who you are 😉

PS- anything else I should add to that list above?👀 😅💫

2. I was blaming outside forces and people for my problems in life. And it was only in sharing this verbally to a non judgemental sounding board of humans that I realised it’s always a mirror, I’m blaming myself. My own insecurities made me do it. It’s a mechanism of self protection, when you blame outside forces. I also became aware of this because I was triggered when I saw it play out in someone else at the retreat. I judged and I had to really look at why that was. Not to mention I spent precious masterminding time asking about my love life basically, and playing innocent. Not wanting to talk about the real insecurities that were in full flare up even before the retreat. I’m sure smoking weed and drinking on two of the nights didn’t help. 🙈It was also an intense and fast paced few days right on the back of an international flight so I was physically tired, trying to give myself grace. 

In any case, whether it came out during the retreat or right after one things for sure, I am grateful to be aware of this emotion and beliefs causing the insecurity, I also know there is a power and purpose to insecurity so instead of trying to make it smaller, I’m listening to what it’s saying. Not as if cursed by the words but as an observer. Things can only be true if you decide them to be, this is my lesson. It’s only because of the sounding board and being around others that I was able to see this. 

👇🏽

replies.text: @cathowell "Things can only be true if you decide them to be" is huge. Hella golden nuggets from this experience with everyone.

latestComments.text: @lizansimpson oh man you would have loved it, everyone is keen for AU again 👀

caption: Freebies work well to warm audiences but sometimes when you run ads to them they can attract, well, not so great quality leads (and even lots of bots). Don’t worry about freebies until you’re in the scaling phase of growing your low ticket offer.

latestComments.text: ooh yes I learned that the hard way...Not doing free now..

One of those things I’ve never heard in learning Digital Marketing. 😂 I often heard folks parroting Gary’s “Jab, Jab, Jab, Right Hook” but you’re actually sharing the nuance of why giving free stuff prematurely isn’t the best approach. From what you’re sharing from your low ticket journey I’m starting to realize there’s definitely an unlearning process too for myself. 😆

replies.text: @vektheartist it used to work ten years ago, not anymore

@vektheartist but yea even ten years ago you should sell direct first just to make sure the offer actually converts and get a baseline data. Once you have a baseline cost per purchase then you can see the direct impact of adding the freebie in the front ;)

caption: Depression is a form of creative intelligence, do you agree?
